Courses Eligibility

college_info.college_name: Regenesys Business School: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
Regenesys Business School is a Business Management institute located in Vashi, Navi Mumbai, India. Established in 1998, Regenesys Business School has taught and trained over two lakh students from 120 countries in the last 20 years who are now placed in reputed organisations across the globe. The main campus of Regenesys is in South Africa. The institute offers Global MBA and Online MBA programmes that are accredited by the Council of Higher Education (South Africa), Department of Higher Education and Training (South Africa) and South African Qualifications Authority. Regenesys Business School conducts its own entrance test RMAT (Regenesys Management Aptitude Test) for admission to the above-mentioned programmes.

Regenesys India lays strong emphasis on emotional, cognitive and spiritual elements while imparting management and leadership training and workshops. The courses are offered in association with Regenesys Business School that is accredited to CHE (Council of Higher Education, South Africa), and is registered as a private institute with the Department of Higher Education and Training under the Higher Education Act, 1997, South Africa. The degrees are awarded by South Africa campus. Regenesys is a member of the African Association of Business Schools (AABS) and South African Business School Association (SABSA).

The key highlights of Regenesys Business School are mentioned below:

The Global MBA programme offered by the institute focuses on the key Management areas of study such as HR, Marketing, Economics, Research, Innovation, IT, Finance, etc. Students can choose their specialisations in the fields of Mergers and Acquisitions, International Management, Mentoring and Coaching, Corporate Governance and Organisational Development.

In addition, the institute offers courses such as PG Diploma in Business Management and BBA along-with a few executive programmes such as Leadership Skills for New Managers, Leadership Development Programme and Senior Leadership Development Programme. The other key features of Regenesys Business School are as follows:

The entry requirements for the MBA programmes are Honours degree, RMAT score, updated CV, interview with academic, transcript of higher qualification and motivation letter

The top courses offered by Regenesys Business School along-with their eligibility criteria and fee structure are mentioned below:

Read more: Regenesys Business School Courses

Regenesys Business School admissions are done basis internal entrance exam followed by a personal interview round. The institute conducts RMAT (Regenesys Management Admission Test) for admission to Global MBA and Online MBA programmes. It is a compulsory MCQs-based online entrance examination of 60 minutes conducted by Regenesys Business School for its accredited courses. The mode of application at Regenesys is online.

The final selection of candidates will depend upon their overall performance in RMAT, personal interview and academics. The weightage given to these sections for Global MBA and Online programmes is presented below in the tabular format:

Read more: Regenesys Business School Admissions

Regenesys Business School provides placement assistance to students. It also offers internships with premier organisations that help students to develop communication skills and business network across every industry segment. Job workshops are also conducted for students. Alumni of Regenesys Business School are placed in top multinational organisations, corporate houses and government institutions.

Some of the recruiting companies visit the campus include Mercedes Benz, Microsoft, Intel, Coca Cola and Dentsu Webchutney.

Read more: Regenesys Business School Placements

Regenesys Business School Scholarships are offered to eligible and deserving candidates. However, the final decision is solely made by the academic council of the institute. Apart from this, the institute provides education loans to students who need financial support.

The institute provides education loan to students by connecting them to banks such as SBI, Axis Bank, Andhra Bank and IDBI Bank.

placements.overview:
Regenesys Business School is a Business Management institute located in Vashi, Navi Mumbai, India. Established in 1998, Regenesys Business School has taught and trained over two lakh students from 120 countries in the last 20 years who are now placed in reputed organisations across the globe. The main campus of Regenesys is in South Africa. The institute offers Global MBA and Online MBA programmes that are accredited by the Council of Higher Education (South Africa), Department of Higher Education and Training (South Africa) and South African Qualifications Authority. Regenesys Business School conducts its own entrance test RMAT (Regenesys Management Aptitude Test) for admission to the above-mentioned programmes.

Regenesys India lays strong emphasis on emotional, cognitive and spiritual elements while imparting management and leadership training and workshops. The courses are offered in association with Regenesys Business School that is accredited to CHE (Council of Higher Education, South Africa), and is registered as a private institute with the Department of Higher Education and Training under the Higher Education Act, 1997, South Africa. The degrees are awarded by South Africa campus. Regenesys is a member of the African Association of Business Schools (AABS) and South African Business School Association (SABSA).

Established in 1998, Regenesys Business School is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The institute offers courses like MBA/PGDM, B.Com, B.A., BBA and PG Diploma. These courses are offered in Full Time and Part Time mode. A total of 27 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Teaching & Education and Banking, Finance & Insurance. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Business Management (PDBM) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The college can provide good exposure.

review_content.Placements: The college has good placement policies. Almost all the students were getting placed. The placement record is 100%. The average salary is up to 8 Lacs. And the highest package is around 34 Lacs. It is also same for the internship almost all the students placed in good firms.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is on the top. It is like we visited any high profile hotel. The classrooms having Wi-Fi and AC connectivity. But the only problem is that the hostel is too far from the college almost 14 km from the campus. All indoor sports available in the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Global Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Regenesys is a good platform to set a career.

review_content.Placements: The placements are 100% guaranteed by the college. The companies offer a good package. Top recruiting companies for placements are PepsiCo, Vodacom, etc. It is a good college for a good career.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a neat, clean and good hostel, but it is almost 40 miles far away. There is one society with gym and swimming pool. There are comfortable library and classrooms which gives a comfortable environment to study. There are good medical facilities, and there is a first aid kit in the college.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly skilled, qualified and share excellent knowledge. Faculty help us to develop skills that can use in both personal and professional world. The curriculum is relevant to the corporate world, which helps students to learn leadership and management skills.

reviews_list.batch_info: Global Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The college provided excellent placements in 2017.

review_content.Placements: Regenesys has 100% placement record. All my batchmates got placed in good companies with excellent packages. Some of the leading MNCs have visited the campus for placements. Even the internship programme offered by the college was excellent. We got some good experience with a healthy stipend. Credit should be given to the placement cell of the college as it was very efficient.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the college were top-notch. We have never faced any issues with the infrastructure like classrooms, hostel rooms and even the quality of food in the canteen, during our tenure.

reviews_list.batch_info: Global Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: In 2017, the faculty members are the best, and the placements are awesome.

review_content.Placements: The placements of the college are good. 100% of the student got placed. The highest package is 36 LPA by SA, and the average is 15 LPA by Mercedes, Vodacom, BMW, etc., offered the roles of the manager, etc. 100% internship is given in the best companies. The highest stipend is Rs. 35,000 by SA and the lowest is no idea. Don't be tensed about the placements, as the placements are good. The students are placed in good company with the best package. Take the admission in this college for the good future.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is the Wi-Fi facility on the campus. The classrooms, library, sports, yoga, dance, Zumba, digital studies, work experience, and most-experienced faculty are awesome. There is no food service, but out of the college, you can get awesome quality food, so there is no problem for food. All types of food are available here. The hostel rooms are good. I had no issue with the college. One of the best colleges for the management in Navi Mumbai.

review_summary.college_name: Regenesys Business School Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Business Management (PDBM) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college can provide good exposure.

content.Placements: The college has good placement policies. Almost all the students were getting placed. The placement record is 100%. The average salary is up to 8 Lacs. And the highest package is around 34 Lacs. It is also same for the internship almost all the students placed in good firms.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is on the top. It is like we visited any high profile hotel. The classrooms having Wi-Fi and AC connectivity. But the only problem is that the hostel is too far from the college almost 14 km from the campus. All indoor sports available in the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Global Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Regenesys is a good platform to set a career.

content.Placements: The placements are 100% guaranteed by the college. The companies offer a good package. Top recruiting companies for placements are PepsiCo, Vodacom, etc. It is a good college for a good career.
content.Infrastructure: There is a neat, clean and good hostel, but it is almost 40 miles far away. There is one society with gym and swimming pool. There are comfortable library and classrooms which gives a comfortable environment to study. There are good medical facilities, and there is a first aid kit in the college.
content.Faculty: The teachers are highly skilled, qualified and share excellent knowledge. Faculty help us to develop skills that can use in both personal and professional world. The curriculum is relevant to the corporate world, which helps students to learn leadership and management skills.

individual_reviews.course: Global Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college provided excellent placements in 2017.

content.Placements: Regenesys has 100% placement record. All my batchmates got placed in good companies with excellent packages. Some of the leading MNCs have visited the campus for placements. Even the internship programme offered by the college was excellent. We got some good experience with a healthy stipend. Credit should be given to the placement cell of the college as it was very efficient.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the college were top-notch. We have never faced any issues with the infrastructure like classrooms, hostel rooms and even the quality of food in the canteen, during our tenure.

individual_reviews.course: Global Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: In 2017, the faculty members are the best, and the placements are awesome.

content.Placements: The placements of the college are good. 100% of the student got placed. The highest package is 36 LPA by SA, and the average is 15 LPA by Mercedes, Vodacom, BMW, etc., offered the roles of the manager, etc. 100% internship is given in the best companies. The highest stipend is Rs. 35,000 by SA and the lowest is no idea. Don't be tensed about the placements, as the placements are good. The students are placed in good company with the best package. Take the admission in this college for the good future.
content.Infrastructure: There is the Wi-Fi facility on the campus. The classrooms, library, sports, yoga, dance, Zumba, digital studies, work experience, and most-experienced faculty are awesome. There is no food service, but out of the college, you can get awesome quality food, so there is no problem for food. All types of food are available here. The hostel rooms are good. I had no issue with the college. One of the best colleges for the management in Navi Mumbai.

admission_process.title: Regenesys Business School Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Regenesys Business School admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Regenesys Business School considers scores in GMAT, MAH CET, and Maharashtra HSC for admission to specific courses.Regenesys Business Schooloffers courses at the UG, PG and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 15 months - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 1 year - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,11,427 - 12,84,791. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 3,99,000 - 23,75,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

college_info.college_name: Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology:

faqs.answer: A:    Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology has courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Engineering. Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology goes up to 510.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Dhruva Institute of Engineering and Technology?

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with everything in this college.

review_content.Placements: Only half of the percentage of students get placements every time. It is the worst college. The salary offered is also low. Students score low percentage. Students get an internship on their own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility for students. The library is only for showing purpose. Classrooms are somewhat good and neat. Labs are not equipped with all equipment. Food served in the hostel is not good. Only outdoor games are available for the students. Medical facilities are available.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members teaching quality is very low. Some teachers studied in this college only after completing their post-graduation, then they joined the same college for teaching. They don't plan a relevant curriculum. They just focus on teaching and forward the subjects for some lessons. They do not have knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the waste colleges. No one got placed in my batch. All my friends did different courses in different institutions to get placed. And last but not the least it is no more operating now. College management gave their building to government institute for lease.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is nothing to describe about that school. It is a small square. No Wi-Fi in hostel not even in college. No adequate equipments in labs and no books library and they used to provide taste less food in hostel. In my 4 years I didn't heard about medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good to score marks, and the campus has a peaceful environment.

review_content.Placements: Little placements are provided by the college, i.e., like BPO's, but they inform about the placements done by pool campus outside the college. Only little strength can be seen in college, and no one had interest in placements provided by the college. They came to complete their degree here, and the staff helps greatly to score good marks in the internals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Here, we can see everything in small college, and there is enough number of infrastructure I can say more than enough because of a low strength in college. Many colleges don't have enough infrastructure, but here we can see more classes and benches, than students. There is a basketball court to play, and there is enough ground to play cricket.

I joined there as HR executive, my salary is 20000 per month. There are 100 percentage of students got internship from various companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: I studied in MAM college of engineering and technology located in Trichy. This is one of the finest and well reputed college in Trichy. I have completed management course over there. That institution have a well reputed and well trained staff to teach the students. I gathered so much knowledge over there. reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: I won't choose this college if there is a time machine to go back.

review_content.Placements: I have done my B.E. civil engineering here, and I can't find a departmental placement service. Only the recruiters from BPO service centres arrive the campus. There is no placement campaigns are done. The placement cell works by name for money as they force the students to join training and placement service cell to get money. I will rate my college by 1/5 for the placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not bad and not good enough. The buildings are incomplete and remain the same. There is no separate block for the department, and the lab facilities are bad. The library in the campus is good enough, and no awareness about games and sports are done. The quality of the classroom is not bad, but they don't provide any digital classroom. I will rate 2 out of 5 for the infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: In my batch, I was disappointed, but now the college has changed.

review_content.Placements: There were 75% placements on campus with packages of 3 LPA, and 50% of students got internships. The pass percentage typically ranged from 75 to 85%, depending on the subject and semester. With regular effort, most students were able to clear the exams without much trouble.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in a good way. There were more specifications for easy learning. With regular effort, most students were able to clear the exams without much trouble. More cultural and sports events were conducted. The hostel was okay, and the food was also better.

college_info.college_name: Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Aurora s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal):

faqs.answer: A:    Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Nanotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal)?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) goes up to 636.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal)?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal).

review_content.Placements: There were not many placements in our college. Only BPOs visited the college to recruit the students of our batch and our senior batch. The packages offered to the students range from 1 lakh per annum to 2 lakhs per annum. No internship is offered. By joining Aurora, you end up wasting 4 years of your life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are the other worst category in our college. No Wi-Fi facility is provided. Labs are available with limited equipment. Sufficient classrooms are not available, they are managed by giving alternate half days. There is no ground to play. The food provided in the canteen is not much good. We all have suffered from these facilities for four years.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: 50-50 college depends on your self study.

review_content.Placements: Yes we have got placements but not from core companies. We all got about got 15-20 companies for placement in 2016. But in that count they are 5 companies only for CSE and it. And other 15 were BPO's and technical support associate. Overall college strives to get placements for their students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as Wi-Fi and internet are adequate in our college. Classrooms and lab facilities are clean and maintained nicely. Canteen is the best part in our college,consists of all types of food and neatly maintained. We don't have college hostel but we do have other private hostels near by college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017

faqs.question: Q: Which courses are offered by Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal)?

faqs.answer: Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has a review rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.1 on Infrastructure.
faqs.question: Q: Is Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B. Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University. The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class from any recognised Board/Council.

Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class from any recognised Board/Council.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) for UG/PG courses?

rows:
Candidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.

Candidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B. Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University.
The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.
Candidate must have passed 10th class from any recognised Board/Council.

overview_faqs.question: Is Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has a review rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty. There are no good placements.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students in our college were placed. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was up to 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies offered placements. Top roles were not offered in our course. The salary package offered in our course is up to 2.5 LPA. Internships offered in our course are very less.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is too good, and labs in our course are not good. It does not work sometimes. The facility of labs is separate from the classroom. Classrooms are there in our course and department. Facilities in our course are good. The hostel facility is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal).

content.Placements: Companies like Amazon, Oyo, Infosys and Google visited our campus for placements. I was studying at this college. The college has celebrated the fest and an annual day extremely well. The education provided was good. Ragging is not encouraged. The HOD and staff members of the civil department are very good. They made me study a lot. They played cricket, and they are the champions of our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like labs, classrooms etc. Sports and games facilities like hockey, chess, cricket, football, volleyball, throwball, table tennis, table tennis, carrom, gym, etc., are available. It is a very good college to study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal).

content.Placements: There were not many placements in our college. Only BPOs visited the college to recruit the students of our batch and our senior batch. The packages offered to the students range from 1 lakh per annum to 2 lakhs per annum. No internship is offered. By joining Aurora, you end up wasting 4 years of your life.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are the other worst category in our college. No Wi-Fi facility is provided. Labs are available with limited equipment. Sufficient classrooms are not available, they are managed by giving alternate half days. There is no ground to play. The food provided in the canteen is not much good. We all have suffered from these facilities for four years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: 50-50 college depends on your self study.

content.Placements: Yes we have got placements but not from core companies. We all got about got 15-20 companies for placement in 2016. But in that count they are 5 companies only for CSE and it. And other 15 were BPO's and technical support associate. Overall college strives to get placements for their students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as Wi-Fi and internet are adequate in our college. Classrooms and lab facilities are clean and maintained nicely. Canteen is the best part in our college,consists of all types of food and neatly maintained. We don't have college hostel but we do have other private hostels near by college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: As per present fee, it's not worth for placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: At the end of our batch, we got very fewer placements compared with our senior batches. We got companies like Amazon, Genpact, ICICI, Ux reactor, Purple talk, Ea sports and every company recruited minimum 10-20. We didn't get any core companies, and all are mostly BPO's.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is below average. We didn't have required systems in computer labs and required instruments in core labs. The classrooms are good and comfortable. We have sports room also, in sports room we will be having chess, carrom and table tennis.

highlights.summary: The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Founded in 2008, GNI Business School is an institute. It is located in Hyderabad, Telangana. The institute is accredited with AICTE. GNI Business School provides PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across specialisation such as Operations. Some of the course offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM. The student intake for these courses is 120. GNI Business School offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies. GNI Business School offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty who builds students' confidence and supports them to build their career.

review_content.Placements: Almost everyone who was career oriented got placed. The highest package is around 8.5 LPA and the average is 4.5 - 6.5 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 Lacs. Top recruiting companies for finance are Invesco, S&P global, CARE Ratings, JP Morgan. The top role offered in our course is research analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students are provided with a high-speed internet connection for easy study. Classrooms are student-friendly and smart with proper digital equipment and a projector. A very calm and peaceful environment to focus on studies. And also canteen available which provides all required food items one needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is completely worth the money we pay.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of the students got placed from our college until now. Placements are started from 2nd semester, whereas other colleges conduct from 3rd semester. I got an internship in the Times of India. I am lucky to get a certificate from that company, and I am thankful for GNI.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of facilities and atmosphere available here provide a feeling like it is a second home. Providing knowledge is the main motive of this college. We should bring our own lunch, and there is a cafeteria to do lunch.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Altogether studying in GNI Business School was an incredible experience for me.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students get placed at the end of the year and it is totally up to the students if they want to get placement or not. All the placement process happens under the support, guidance, and assistance of college and professors. If a student wants to opt-out of the placement and wants to start their own business then they can also opt-out from the placement process.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good in terms of the classroom, library, cafeteria, and staff or faculty rooms. All are well maintained especially in today's scenario of COVID where they follow the COVID guidelines very strictly to maintain the college hygiene. And one of the essential facilities that the college provides the business students is Wi-Fi 24*7.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: There are qualified professors with good practical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: The placement department here is good. They support you until you get selected in an interview. The salary package offered ranges from 3.5 LPA to 6 LPA, which is offered in top companies like FedEx, DuPont, etc. Every student got an internship for 3 months in good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility and library. Our college conducts industrial visits to places out of the city for enjoyment and to hang out for some time to relax from daily routine.
review_content.Faculty: Professors are well-qualified, cooperative and provide practical knowledge. They also provide courses which are relevant shortly, which makes students be ready and qualify in the interview in one attempt. Courses are also practical-oriented that seems to be easy for students who are below average. It conducts group assignment and projects to interact with classmates and understand them better.

All are well maintained especially in today's scenario of COVID where they follow the COVID guidelines very strictly to maintain the college hygiene. And one of the essential facilities that the college provides the business students is Wi-Fi 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: There are qualified professors with good practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility and library. Our college conducts industrial visits to places out of the city for enjoyment and to hang out for some time to relax from daily routine.

reviews_list.review_title: This is an average review, but I am very satisfied with the coding club and the music club.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students at our college are placed, with top recruiting companies being TCS, Infosys, and others. review_summary.college_name: Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Our college provides very good placement opportunities for students. Around 80 to 85 percent of students from our batch are successfully placed in reputed companies. The highest package reaches 12 LPA, the lowest package is around 3 LPA, and the average package is approximately 6 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, L&T, and Tech Mahindra. Many students also receive internship opportunities in companies like Cognizant and IBM. It helps them gain practical industry experience. The roles offered include software developer, data analyst, web developer, and IT support positions.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placement with placement support, modern infrastructure, and active campus life.

content.Placements: The Computer Engineering branch recorded a 98% placement rate, the highest among courses. IT & Core Recruiters are TCS, Capgemini, Infosis, Wipro, Way to Web, and many more than 250+ companies have placement drives in the present year. Average CTC is generally reported between 3 to 5LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Air conditioned classrooms with advanced touch boards and projectors, we also have a huge hall which has the capacity to keep a huge number of students together. A huge library with more than 41,000 books and journals related to engineering and other courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is an average review, but I am very satisfied with the coding club and the music club.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students at our college are placed, with top recruiting companies being TCS, Infosys, and others. Students find and complete their internships on their own. The top roles offered are just for "time pass," as there is no practical knowledge of the latest technology. There is very poor information about the latest industry trends, and placements are not very strong here.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities a person needs are available, but the fees are very high compared to what is provided, and there is no freedom. The fees are very high compared to the facilities. For everything you do in class, they will charge you a ₹250 fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Unbreakable experience - A journey worth living.

content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities with top MNCs visiting every year. Many students from my batch get placed in reputed companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro with decent salary packages. The placement cell is very supportive and conducts mock interviews and workshops to prepare us.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is clean and well-maintained. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and smart boards. Library has a wide collection of books and journals. Hostel facilities are decent, with proper security, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food provided in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and has decent faculty members.

content.Placements: About 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are BharatPe, TCS, and Infosys. All students got internships from our course. Top roles offered are manager, coder, etc. It depends on companies' demand.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Our college does not provide us with a Wi-Fi password. All classrooms are air-conditioned. There is no hostel in our college. Our college has a canteen. It will be upgraded. There is no mess facility in our college. Our college conducts sports for two hours a week.

description: Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 6473 and 50639 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.E. in Civil Engineering. The first

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Civil Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 6473 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.E. in Information Technology and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Among all the specialisations, B.E. in Computer Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Cyber Security) were the most competitive for admission in the General HS categ

reviews.review_text: Campus is clean and well-maintained. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and smart boards. Library has a wide collection of books and journals. Hostel facilities are decent, with proper security, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food provided in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and has decent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Our college does not provide us with a Wi-Fi password. All classrooms are air-conditioned. There is no hostel in our college. Our college has a canteen. It will be upgraded. There is no mess facility in our college. Our college conducts sports for two hours a week.

reviews.review_heading: Our department organises many events.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our department are computer labs, a library, air-conditioned classrooms, and a canteen with average food quality. Classrooms are wide and spacious with good ventilation. Sports and games equipment is provided during events. Library access is open to all students. Our campus infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had the best infrastructure and good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. Our college is good. Our college provides a good Wi-Fi connection in every lab, classroom, and campus. The hostel facilities are good. Our college provides us with sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The highest salary offered ranges between Rs. 25,000 - Rs.30,000 per month. The lowest salary offered ranges between Rs.6,000 - Rs.7000 per month. MNCs won't visit our college to recruit students. Around 30% of students got internships.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges in Bhavnagar.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available in our college. Facilities like Wi-Fi, smart labs, and classrooms are available in our college. Library has sufficient books for every student. Many sports activities are available in our college like cricket, badminton, football, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available for students. The food served in the canteen is average. The hostel facilities are good. Our college provides the best facilities for our course. Our college conducts sports activities and many cultural programs.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not so good, but education, faculty, and cultural activities are all good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are good. The college is neat and clean. They provide the best facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all the facilities are available like library, a canteen that contains good food, physical and technical labs, reading room, projectors in every classrooms and AC rooms. A medical room is there for emergency and fire safety. Many exit gates are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely best college for you and your life.
reviews.review_text: I enjoy labs and libraries. Internet access is available in labs for students to gain knowledge from various websites. There are many book collections in the library. You can prepare for the GATE exam by reading GATE-related books. There are also many reference books available for advanced study.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like Wi-Fi, lab, personal lab, and library are provided to students. The classroom is very good to study in. You feel like studying and you want to enjoy the study. The canteen is quite good and the food is the same as homemade so the taste is very good.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Bhavnagar.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge library where all subject books are available. We have volleyball and badminton court. We also have a huge campus along with huge parking. Many trees have been planted on our huge campus. We also have a separate room for different activities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a private college. Many students are from nearby areas that is fine.

content.Placements: In the fourth year, students are eligible for campus placements. TCS visited the college and hired 20 students. In my college, the highest package is 25 LPA. 75% of students attended placements. After getting a degree, they get jobs. In this college, recently TCS came and offered placements for some students who do not have backlogs and score a good CGPA. I have done a project named diabetics prediction. It also gives a good outcome.
content.Infrastructure: We have a fest and an annual fest. Both vary but one will be at the end of the year and one is around March. The library does not have many books. Whenever we go to take some books, they will be already with students as there will be 2 or 3 books. Facilities are good. Sports are better because we have an inter-college volleyball championship in our college. There are IEDC and IEEE clubs.

content.Faculty: All the faculty members are well experienced in their subjects. Faculty members provide notes and help us with our doubts. Faculty members are good. Teachers guide students and provide extra classes as well.

reviews_list.review_title: It is not worth for the money paid.

review_content.Placements: The average salary offered was Rs 12,000 per month. The highest salary offered is Rs 30,000 per month. Some local companies also visit our campus for recruitment. B.Com-related jobs are not provided in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen is like a footpath store, and the food quality is not good. There is only one elevator in our college. Semester exams are also not good.
review_content.Faculty: In our college, teachers are not good. They do not provide good notes. Teachers themselves do not know proper English and students learn from YouTube and pass their exams. Their behavior is also not good. Faculty members are also not helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the studies and teachers' guidance, but not with the cultural activities.

review_content.Placements: Every student who has skills will be selected. No matter what the salary package is, if the student agrees. Well, I am still a third-year student, so from what I have heard, the lowest package is Rs. 20,000 per month, but I don’t know about the highest, like Amazon, etc. Maybe everyone gets an internship in my college, but I don’t have knowledge about this.
review_content.Faculty: Well, teachers are very friendly and teach in a way that is easy to understand. They fill us with a lot of knowledge. It definitely helps students get ready. It is not very difficult, but some subjects can be challenging. However, with hard work and smart work, we can succeed.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for education with talented and supportive teachers.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides training on aptitude cracking and how to talk in an interview. We have management fests where many colleges come and participate. I got selected in 5 companies like Infosys, TCS, Capgemini, HDFC and Accenture. We had good training for banks also.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is there but students are not allowed. Medical facilities are good, food quality has improved, we have sports day and Yoga for us and sports we have a ground. There are Lectures who come from different institutions and we have Public speakers which help us gain knowledge.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. description: Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 432190 and 699649 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Co

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 432190 for the general AI quota.

Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Maharana Institute of Technology and Sciences JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

review_summary.college_name: School of Arts and Sciences, Ahmedabad University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The students can have their best experience, because of its excellent education and amenities.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 36 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Goldman Sach, Google, Amazon, and Codenation. Almost 10-20% of students get internships in Goldman Sach, Flashtech, etc. The top roles offered are software engineer, data science engineer, DevOps, UI, UX, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are the best among the top well-known colleges. It has a central air-conditioner, and it provides the best Wi-Fi speed. It also provides laboratories, classrooms, study room, and all the sports facilities, canteen, auditorium, gym, a library, and many such facilities are provided. The new hostel facility is under construction, but it also provides the best experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, faculty, unorthodox exam pattern and prepares you for the real world.

content.Placements: Since it's only been 3 years, placements are yet to happen. But looking at the crowd in B.A. (Hons) Economics, I think the placements are going to be well for the students as well as the university. This summer, placements will be taking place for the 2023 cohort.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent with the new student activity centre, playground, the food, Wi-Fi, classrooms are amazing. The university is generally open till late at night. Amazing grounds and greenery, scenic architecture, air-conditioned classrooms, unlimited Wi-Fi, and much more.

faqs.question: What is the scope after qualifying UGC NET?
faqs.answer: This is for the candidates who want to do PhD research or become Assistant professor. However, other career options can be PSUs jobs as well.The candidates who do not want to join any PSU can take up other options like online tutor, open their own coaching centres, guest faculty, consultant, Lab Trainer, IP lead, Author, Editor, Executive, Program Executive, etc.For conclusion we can say that the candidates qualifying for the UGC NET exam can take up any job they want or start their ow business after clearing one of the most the toughest exams in India.

reviews.review_heading: The students can have their best experience, because of its excellent education and amenities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are the best among the top well-known colleges. It has a central air-conditioner, and it provides the best Wi-Fi speed. It also provides laboratories, classrooms, study room, and all the sports facilities, canteen, auditorium, gym, a library, and many such facilities are provided. The new hostel facility is under construction, but it also provides the best experience.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, faculty, unorthodox exam pattern and prepares you for the real world.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent with the new student activity centre, playground, the food, Wi-Fi, classrooms are amazing. The university is generally open till late at night. Amazing grounds and greenery, scenic architecture, air-conditioned classrooms, unlimited Wi-Fi, and much more.

reviews.review_heading: Ahmedabad University with its robust faculty is a step in the right direction for liberal education.
reviews.review_text: Since I joined college after the Covid onslaught, I wouldn't be in a position to comment on the facilities provided by the university. That being said, we have received word from the seniors about the same, and most have had only good things to say about the amenities availed by them (food, electricity, water, recreational and gym facilities). Among outstation students, there is a preference for the university's hostel accommodation despite it being located at some distance from the university. ...

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied, and they are very attentive. The infrastructure is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are all excellent, really, you should try it out. The infrastructure is excellent. Everything is neat. Wi-Fi is excellent but limited to some websites. Labs are amazing, and classrooms are also excellent. The library is huge and standard. Everything is superb.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied environment.
reviews.review_text: Good and intellectual facilities, all facilities in the hostel including variety of foods. Different games and sports. All affiliated of Wi-Fi free for all of universities students and others. Classroom have best class of smartclass, whiteboards, table, AC, fans and good qualities of chair. The hostel facilities are best satisfied with everything good food, environment, gym, washing machines, AC, TVs, AC, B.Ed table, chair and silent study classroom in hostel. Medical facilities are available at...

reviews.review_heading: I prefer everyone to apply for this college due to good placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs of physics and chemistry are very nice and also, the instruments are all working properly.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are average, but teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best facilities and infrastructure like a library, Wi-Fi and classrooms. The quality of our hostel facilities is good, but not every student likes the food served in the hostel. Medical, sports and games facilities are good. Overall, the hostel is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, good faculty, good labs and facilities, and decent hostels.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is nice. It is divided into seven buildings, each representing one field of education Science and Arts, Engineering, Social and Liberal Arts. Labs for Life Sciences are neatly kept and have up-to-date equipment and skilled assistants. Wi-Fi facility in the college is decent. The library is vast and has a well-curated selection of books to advance our knowledge in both our courses and personal interests. Hostels are clean, neat, and spacious. The food is nutritious, tho...

A:    Shri Ram Institute of Science & Technology, Jabalpur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together.
Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %.
Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks.
Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis.
OR
Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years

Majorly roles offered are full stack developer, web designer, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Ram Institute of Science & Technology

labs.description: Available Facilities: State of Art Labs

reviews.review_heading: The summary is that you can join the college without any hesitation.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The computer lab is very good, the internet speed is very fast, and the hostel building is very big. The rooms are also very good. There is excellent connectivity to the hospital, and the canteen is also very spacious. The food quality is wow.

reviews.review_heading: Good for campus and training.
reviews.review_text: The college provides decent infrastructure, well-equipped labs, and Wi-Fi in most academic areas. The library is well-stocked with online and offline resources and proper content. In manner of hostel infrastructure it is quite well good and the canteen is properly clean.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life at Shri Ram Institute of Science and Technology Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided by Global Engineering College and Management Jabalpur are very good and adequate. Some classrooms and labs are fully cleaned, and the benches and desks are in better condition. The quality of canteen food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: My college is big but also has some problem like some teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very big and divided into three parts. And every college has its own different types of lab, like civil department, computer lab, chemistry lab, mechanical department, and many more, and it also has a library, but my college does not provide hostel facilities, which has created problems for outside students.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good place for someone to build and shape their career.
reviews.review_text: The complete infrastructure of my college is very amazing. There were so many labs, a library, well-equipped labs, and smart classrooms; the library is also very updated; the books are very good; the books they kept are very updated; and hostel facilities are very nice; it's very satisfying and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: College is moderate but it gives us full support.
reviews.review_text: The library needs maintenance for 2nd to 4th-year students, and it’s a drawback that the books are not up to date with real-time needs. Wifi is fully available. The classrooms are average—neither very good nor very bad. There is no hostel in our college, and the canteen food is expensive.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in Global Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The global college provides the best labs in whole Jabalpur, and Wi-Fi is not available for B.Tech students. The infrastructure and facilities provided by Global Engineering College and Management Jabalpur are very good and enough. Some classrooms and labs are fully cleaned, and the benches and desks are in very good condition. Overall, the infrastructure is good. The quality of canteen food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, the infrastructure is nice and the department is also good. Wi-Fi is not available for students, labs are good, classrooms are also good, the food quality is good, sports activities also happen, and games are also played.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram Institute of Science & Technology, Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, but the infrastructure is not up to par. Wi-Fi is available in some labs for students, and the labs and classrooms are satisfactory. The library is good, although sometimes experiences may be unfavourable. Sports facilities and food options are also satisfactory for students, and games are organized periodically.

reviews.review_heading: A very honest review of Shri Ram Institute Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In Shri Ram Institute of Science and Technology, there are better classrooms equipped with coolers, ACs, projectors, and some classrooms have digital smartboards for study purposes. The entire campus of this college is Wi-Fi enabled. Shri Ram College boasts the biggest library with 4000 to 5000 books.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nice, but there are fewer facilities for the students. The study and faculty are nice
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good; there are many labs, and Wi-Fi is available in them. Classrooms and the library are also available. The hostel facility is not so good, but the mess and canteen food quality is good. Medical facilities are also nice, and there is a proper ground for sports and games, with sports kits available.

reviews.review_heading: A very honest college review of Shri Ram Institute of Science & Technology, Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Shri Ram Institute of Science and Technology college has better and better infrastructure, which has coolers, A.C., Wi-Fi, some smart boards, projectors, etc. in the classroom. There are labs for every subject at Shri Ram College, and all machines in the labs are working. And this college has a very good library and books for every subject are available.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college that has a great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The good facilities provided by the college and the infrastructure are also good, the labs are very good, the classrooms are well spaced, the library experience is not so good, the quality of food in the canteen is average and sports and games are also played in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available and the course is also available in four branches: civil, mechanical, electronic and electrical, computer science and so many more. Classes are good and big with smart projectors; Wi-Fi is also available; and labs are also good with the latest computers.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, washrooms are available around every floor and infrastructure is nice. Department is good. Wi-Fi is not available for students but the labs are good and classrooms are big and well structured. Canteen has large space. Food quality is average and sports also happen.
